tools.name: publish_html
tools.description: Publish an HTML or markdown artifact (or fetch a remote HTML page) and get a shareable URL. Markdown is rendered into a clean reader page. Useful for sharing reports, dashboards, visualizations, or any document produced by an agent.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: publish_html · Private data: publish_html · Public sink: publish_html.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: publish_html · Private data: publish_html · Public sink: publish_html

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
